title: RNAqueous with DNAse Clean-up by Phenol:Chloroform
author: Dan Richter
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iskcecw

steps.instruction: Place elution solution in a dry bath at 70-80ºC undetermined, per pellet
Place pellet in a 50 mL conical tube on ice
Add lysis buffer undetermined
Pipette up and down 5 times to resuspend the pellet
On ice, add more lysis buffer undetermined
Pipette up and down 20 times to fully resuspend/lyse pellet
Transfer into two 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes undetermined, each
Take an aliquot from one tube and pipette onto a glass slide to check lysis undetermined Keep the slide in a petri dish to ensure the noxious smell is contained
Immediately centrifuge both tubes at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge at 1ºC, 5 min to pellet unlysed bacteria 00:05:00
During centrifugation, add a cover slip to the glass slide and quickly confirm lysis using a microscope.

On ice, pass the lysate in each tube 5 times through a 25 gauge needle fitted to an RNAse-free 1 mL syringe. If cells were not lysed, pass through the needle additional times, and re-check lysis before continuing.
Add 64% EtOH at room temperature (RT) per tube undetermined
Mix thoroughly by inverting the tubes several times
Transfer lysate/ethanol mixture from one of the Eppendorf tubes to a single filter cartridge in a collection tube undetermined
Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, RT, 30 sec or until the mixture is drawm through the filter 00:00:30
Discard the flow through
Repeat steps 15-17 three additional times until all of the lysate/ethanol mixture in both Eppendorf tubes has been drawn through the filter cartridge
Add wash solution #1 undetermined
Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, RT, 30 sec 00:00:30
Discard the flow through
Add wash solution #2/3 undetermined
Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, RT, 30 sec 00:00:30
Discard the flow through
Repeat steps 22-24 once
Centrifuge an additional 30 sec at 15,000 x g to remove residual wash solution #2/3 00:00:30
Place the filter cartridge in a new collection tube
Pipette pre-heated elution solution onto the filter undetermined
Centrifuge at 15,000 x g, 30 sec 00:00:30
Pipette additional pre-heated elution solution onto the filter undetermined
Centrifuge at 15,000 x g, 30 sec Final volume of eluate should be ~45 uL
Spec on NanoDrop and make a dilution at 1:5 (2 µl :8 µl) in a separate tube for PCR/Bioanalyzer undetermined, aliquot

Take an aliquot of 1:5 dilution from previous step and dilute to 1 ng/µL in a seperate tube (for Bioanalyzer) undetermined, aliquot If the concentration is >240 ng/uL (10ug/41.5 uL), dilute an aliquot to 240 ng/uL in 41.5 uL and save remainder at -80C.
Add 10X TURBO DNAse buffer undetermined
Add TURBO DNAse and mix gently undetermined
Incubate at 37ºC for 30 min 00:30:00
Add water to bring volume to 400 µL undetermined, water
Add 3 M sodium acetate at pH = 5.2 (final concentration 0.3 M) undetermined, (1/10 volume)
Add phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol at pH = 8 undetermined, (2 volumes)
Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 sec 00:00:15
Centrifuge at max speed in a microcentrifuge for 2 min 00:02:00 Check for insoluble precipitate, indicating the presence of potassium salts > 20 mM.
Transfer the top/aqueous phase to a new tube undetermined
Add chloroform:isoamyl alcohol at pH = 8 undetermined, (2 volumes)
Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 sec 00:00:15
Centrifuge at max speed in a microcentrifuge for 2 min 00:02:00
Transfer the top/aqueous phase to a new tube undetermined
Add GlycoBlue (final amount ~25 µg, working stock 15 µg/µL) undetermined
Add 100% EtOH undetermined, (2.5 volumes)
Shake vigorously to mix
Freeze overnight at -20ºC
Thaw
Centrifuge at max speed in a microcentrifuge for 10 min 00:10:00
Decant ethanol, then remove residual with pipette.
Wash with -20ºC 70% EtOH
Centrifuge for 5 min, 4ºC
Dry pellet and resuspend in water undetermined
Spec on NanoDrop and dilute RNA to 1 ng/µL in a seperate tube (for Bioanalyzer) undetermined, aliquot
Add SUPERase-In (at 20 U / µl, final concentration 1 U / µl) undetermined
If cells were lysed, transfer supernatant into two new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes. Otherwise, continue with the same tubes.
